name: WeChat Article
description_en: Three-agent workflow to write, edit, and review WeChat articles: author, editor, and reader roles produce publication-ready drafts.
description_zh: 三 Agent 协作撰写微信公众号文章：作者、编辑、读者角色产出可直接发布的草稿。
long_en: One skill from the AI Berkshire value-investing collection. It uses author/editor/reader agents to turn research into a polished WeChat article with structure, voice, and readability checks.
long_zh: AI Berkshire 价值投资技能集之一。使用作者/编辑/读者三代理把研究成果转化为结构完整、口吻一致、可读性经过检查的微信公众号文章。
sec_note_en: Spawns subagents and produces article drafts locally. No external publishing or accounts are used unless you explicitly copy the output into WeChat.
sec_note_zh: 会启动子代理并在本地生成文章草稿。除非你主动把输出粘贴到微信，否则不使用任何外部发布或账号。
